name: weather-api-tests
description: Pruebas de contrato para Weather API - Sprint N+3

scripts.test: newman run collections/WeatherAPI.postman_collection.json --environment collections/WeatherAPI.postman_environment.json --env-var "api_key=$WEATHER_API_KEY" --insecure --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export api-report/index.html --reporter-htmlextra-title 'Weather API - Reporte de Pruebas' --reporter-htmlextra-logs --reporter-htmlextra-displayProgressBar
